106:     // 娣诲姞寤惰繜浠ュ疄鐜伴敊寮€鍔ㄧ敾鏁堟灉
107:     const staggerDelay = Array.from(element.parentElement?.children || []).indexOf(element as HTMLElement) * 100
108: 
109:     if (staggerDelay > 0) {
110:       ;(element as HTMLElement).style.transitionDelay = `${Math.min(staggerDelay, 500)}ms`
111:     }
112: 
113:     requestAnimationFrame(() => {
114:       element.classList.add(visibleClass)
115:       visibleElements.value.add(element)
116:       options.onEnter?.(element)
117:     })
118:   }
119: 
120:   /**
121:    * 澶勭悊鍏冪礌绂诲紑瑙嗗彛
122:    */
123:   const handleLeave = (element: Element, options: ScrollAnimationOptions) => {
124:     if (options.once) return // 濡傛灉鍙Е鍙戜竴娆★紝涓嶅鐞嗙寮€
125: 
126:     const visibleClass = options.visibleClass ?? 'is-visible'
127:     element.classList.remove(visibleClass)
128:     visibleElements.value.delete(element)
129:     options.onLeave?.(element)
130:   }
131: 
132:   /**
133:    * 瑙傚療鍗曚釜鍏冪礌
134:    */
135:   const observe = (element: Element | null, options: ScrollAnimationOptions = {}) => {
136:     if (!element || !isSupported) {
137:       // 濡傛灉涓嶆敮鎸侊紝鐩存帴鏄剧ず鍏冪礌
138:       if (element) {
139:         const mergedOptions = { ...defaultOptions, ...options }
140:         handleEnter(element, mergedOptions)
141:       }
142:       return
143:     }
144: 
145:     const mergedOptions = { ...defaultOptions, ...options }
146:     const animationClass = mergedOptions.animationClass ?? 'scroll-animate'
147: 
148:     // 娣诲姞鍔ㄧ敾绫?    if (animationClass && !element.classList.contains(animationClass)) {
149:       element.classList.add(animationClass)
150:     }
151: 
152:     // 鍒涘缓 observer
153:     const observer = createObserver((entries) => {
154:       entries.forEach((entry) => {
155:         if (entry.isIntersecting) {
156:           handleEnter(entry.target, mergedOptions)
157:           if (mergedOptions.once !== false) {
158:             observer.unobserve(entry.target)
159:             observers.delete(entry.target)
160:           }
161:         } else if (!mergedOptions.once) {
162:           handleLeave(entry.target, mergedOptions)
163:         }
164:       })
165:     }, mergedOptions)
166: 
167:     if (observer) {
168:       observer.observe(element)
169:       observers.set(element, observer)
170:     }
171:   }
172: 
173:   /**
174:    * 鍋滄瑙傚療鍏冪礌
175:    */
176:   const unobserve = (element: Element | null) => {
177:     if (!element) return
178: 
179:     const observer = observers.get(element)
180:     if (observer) {
181:       observer.unobserve(element)
182:       observer.disconnect()
183:       observers.delete(element)
184:     }
185: 
186:     visibleElements.value.delete(element)
187:   }
188: 
189:   /**
190:    * 瑙傚療澶氫釜鍏冪礌
191:    */
192:   const observeElements = (
193:     elements: Element[] | NodeListOf<Element>,
194:     options: ScrollAnimationOptions = {}
195:   ) => {
196:     elements.forEach((el, index) => {
197:       // 涓烘瘡涓厓绱犳坊鍔犻€掑鐨勫欢杩?      const delayOptions = {
198:         ...options,
199:         rootMargin: `${index * 50}px 0px -50px 0px`
200:       }
201:       observe(el, delayOptions)
202:     })
203:   }
204: 
205:   /**
206:    * 浣跨敤榛樿閰嶇疆瑙傚療 Vue ref 鍏冪礌
207:    */
208:   const observeElement = (elementRef: Ref<Element | null>) => {
209:     onMounted(() => {
210:       if (elementRef.value) {
211:         observe(elementRef.value)
212:       }
213:     })
214: 
215:     onUnmounted(() => {
216:       unobserve(elementRef.value)
217:     })
218:   }
219: 
220:   // 娓呯悊鎵€鏈?observer
221:   onUnmounted(() => {
222:     observers.forEach((observer, element) => {
223:       observer.disconnect()
224:     })
225:     observers.clear()
226:     visibleElements.value.clear()
227:   })
228: 
229:   return {
230:     observe,
231:     unobserve,
232:     observeElements,
233:     observeElement,
234:     isSupported,
235:     visibleElements
236:   }
237: }
238: 
239: /**
240:  * 绠€鍖栫増婊氬姩鍔ㄧ敾 - 鑷姩搴旂敤鍒版墍鏈夊甫鏈?data-animate 灞炴€х殑鍏冪礌
241:  */
242: export function useGlobalScrollAnimation(options: ScrollAnimationOptions = {}) {
243:   const { observeElements } = useScrollAnimation(options)
244: 
245:   onMounted(() => {
246:     if (typeof document === 'undefined') return
247: 
248:     // 鏌ユ壘鎵€鏈夊甫鏈?data-animate 灞炴€х殑鍏冪礌
249:     const elements = document.querySelectorAll('[data-animate]')
250: 
251:     // 鏍规嵁 data-animate 鐨勫€艰缃笉鍚岀殑鍔ㄧ敾绫诲瀷
252:     const groupedElements: Record<string, Element[]> = {}
253: 
254:     elements.forEach((el) => {
255:       const animationType = el.getAttribute('data-animate') || 'default'
256:       if (!groupedElements[animationType]) {
257:         groupedElements[animationType] = []
258:       }
259:       groupedElements[animationType].push(el)
260:     })
261: 
262:     // 涓轰笉鍚岀被鍨嬬殑鍔ㄧ敾搴旂敤涓嶅悓鐨勭被
263:     Object.entries(groupedElements).forEach(([type, els]) => {
264:       const animationClass = type === 'default' ? 'scroll-animate' : `scroll-animate-${type}`
265: 
266:       els.forEach((el) => {
267:         if (!el.classList.contains(animationClass)) {
268:           el.classList.add(animationClass)
269:         }
270:       })
271: 
272:       observeElements(els, {
273:         ...options,
274:         animationClass
275:       })
276:     })
277:   })
278: }
279: 
280: /**
281:  * 瑙嗗樊婊氬姩鏁堟灉
282:  */
283: export function useParallax(speed: number = 0.5) {
284:   const parallaxRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null)
285:   let rafId: number | null = null
286: 
287:   const handleScroll = () => {
288:     if (!parallaxRef.value) return
289: 
290:     const rect = parallaxRef.value.getBoundingClientRect()
291:     const scrolled = window.scrollY
292:     const rate = scrolled * speed
293: 
294:     // 鍙湁褰撳厓绱犲湪瑙嗗彛鍐呮椂鎵嶆洿鏂?    if (rect.top < window.innerHeight && rect.bottom > 0) {
295:       parallaxRef.value.style.transform = `translateY(${rate}px)`
296:     }
297:   }
298: 
299:   const onScroll = () => {
300:     if (rafId) return
301:     rafId = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
302:       handleScroll()
303:       rafId = null
304:     })
305:   }
306: 
307:   onMounted(() => {
308:     if (prefersReducedMotion()) return
309:     window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true })
310:   })
311: 
312:   onUnmounted(() => {
313:     window.removeEventListener('scroll', onScroll)
314:     if (rafId) cancelAnimationFrame(rafId)
315:   })
316: 
317:   return parallaxRef
318: }
319: 
320: export default useScrollAnimation

# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

payload.user_instructions:
# AGENTS.md - Codex 项目说明

## 快速开始
1. 新成员按入场顺序阅读 [`.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start)。
2. 必读规则见 [`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)。
3. 工程约定见 [`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)。

## 规则链路
- 入口层：`AGENTS.md`（作用域与索引）。
- 执行层：`.codex/core/AGENT.md`（流程与决策框架）。
- 约束层：`.codex/core/RULES.md`（强制规则与触发矩阵）。
- 规范层：`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`（工程实现标准）。

## 冲突裁决优先级
1. `RULES.md` 与 `CONVENTIONS.md` 冲突时，以 `RULES.md` 为准。
2. `AGENT.md` 仅定义执行流程，不得弱化 `RULES.md` 的强制约束。
3. `AGENTS.md` 作为入口索引，不新增与核心规则冲突的行为约束。
4. 未覆盖场景按 `CONVENTIONS.md` 与最小改动原则执行。

## 必要流程
- 执行前先给出方案，确认后再实施。
- 执行中小步推进，每步都验证。
- 遇到阻塞时切换策略并继续，不要静默中止。

## 结构策略（.codex 标准）
- Git 同步范围为 `./.codex/` 与本 `AGENTS.md`。
- 项目框架文件统一放在 `./.codex/`：`core/`、`skills/`、`snippets/`、`templates/`。
- 运行时技能目录位于用户级：`%USERPROFILE%\\.codex\\skills`。
- 本文件只使用相对链接，不要硬编码本地绝对路径。

## 参考
- 执行框架：[`.codex/core/AGENT.md`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md)
- 规则细则：[`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)
- 编码约定：[`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)

## Skills
A skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.
### Available skills
- _template: 新建 skill 时复制此目录，填写 name/description 后开始编写指令 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/_TEMPLATE/SKILL.md)
- brainstorming: 在进行任何创造性工作（如创建功能、构建组件、添加功能或修改行为）之前，您必须强制使用此技能。用于在编写代码前探索用户意图、梳理需求和设计方案。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/brainstorming/SKILL.md)
- browser-use: 自动化浏览器交互工具，用于 Web 测试、表单填写、屏幕截图和数据提取。当用户需要导航网站、与网页交互、填写表单、捕获页面或从网页中提取信息时触发使用。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/browser-use/SKILL.md)
- codex-skills-sync: 同步和恢复 Codex 本地配置。用于将 `%USERPROFILE%\\.codex` 下的 `core`、`skills`、`snippets`、`templates`、`rules` 以及 `config.toml`、`AGENTS.md` 推送到 GitHub 仓库，或从 GitHub 云端恢复到本机（覆盖不删除）。当用户提出“同步到 GitHub”“云端备份”“从仓库恢复本地 Codex 配置”时使用。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/codex-skills-sync/SKILL.md)
- docker-ci-workflow: 创建和管理 Docker GitHub Actions CI/CD 工作流。当用户需要设置 Docker 自动构建测试、镜像推送、安全扫描、多平台构建或 Docker 部署自动化时触发。支持 GitHub Registry (ghcr.io)、Docker Hub、多阶段构建缓存优化。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/docker-ci-workflow/SKILL.md)
- find-skills: 帮助用户发现和安装生态系统中的大模型 Agent 技能。当用户询问“我该如何做某事”、“寻找关于某事的技能”或希望扩展功能时触发此技能。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md)
- frontend-code-review: 当用户请求审查前端文件（例如 .tsx、.ts、.js）时触发此技能。支持评审即将提交的更改（pending-change）和特定的文件检查，应用各项清单审查。审查包含代码质量、性能问题及业务逻辑。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/frontend-code-review/SKILL.md)
- frontend-design: 创建具有极高设计感和差异化美学（避免常见的“AI味”审美）的生产级前端界面。当要求构建 Web 组件、页面、海报、仪表盘、React 组件或任何 HTML/CSS 布局美化时触发。该技能将指导输出极具创意且抛光良好的 UI 设计。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/frontend-design/SKILL.md)
- fullstack-developer: 提供涵盖 React、Node.js、数据库以及全栈架构的现代 Web 开发专家级知识体系。 当执行以下任务时使用此技能：构建 Web 应用程序、开发 API、创建前端、设置数据库、部署 Web 应用，或者当用户提到 React、Next.js、Express、REST API、GraphQL、MongoDB、PostgreSQL 等全栈开发相关话题时触发。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/fullstack-developer/SKILL.md)
- requesting-code-review: 在完成任务、实现重大功能后，或在代码合并前触发，用于验证并审查代码是否满足需求标准。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/requesting-code-review/SKILL.md)
- test-driven-development: 在实现任何新功能或修复 Bug 之前，即在编写实际业务代码之前必须触发执行的 TDD 测试驱动开发规范。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/test-driven-development/SKILL.md)
- ui-ux-pro-max: 顶级 UI/UX 设计智能全书。包含几十种风格调色板和排版指导，支持 React、Vue、Tailwind 等各种主流框架。执行页面规划、构建、设计、检查、修复和优化视觉方案时触发。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md)
- vercel-react-best-practices: 来源于 Vercel 工程师团队的 React 和 Next.js 性能优化指南。当进行编写、审查或重构 React/Next.js 代码时触发，以确保最佳性能模式。适用于涉及 React 组件、Next.js 页面、数据获取、打包体积优化或性能提升的任务。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/vercel-react-best-practices/SKILL.md)
- web-design-guidelines: 根据 Vercel Web 界面指南（Web Interface Guidelines）审查 UI 代码规范性。当用户要求“审查我的 UI”、“检查无障碍访问(accessibility)”、“审计设计”、“审查 UX”或“根据最佳实践检查我的网站”时触发。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/web-design-guidelines/SKILL.md)
- webapp-testing: 使用 Playwright 与本地 Web 应用程序交互并进行测试的工具包。支持验证前端功能、调试 UI 行为、捕获浏览器屏幕截图以及查看浏览器日志。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/webapp-testing/SKILL.md)
- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)
- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)
### How to use skills
- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.
- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.
- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.
- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):
  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.
  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.
  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.
  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.
  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.
- Coordination and sequencing:
  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.
  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.
- Context hygiene:
  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.
  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.
  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.
- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.

### How to use skills
- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.
- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.
- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.
- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):
  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.
  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.
  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.
  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.
  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.
- Coordination and sequencing:
  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.
  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.
- Context hygiene:
  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.
  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.
  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.
- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.

# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

# AGENTS.md - Codex 项目说明

## 快速开始
1. 新成员按入场顺序阅读 [`.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start)。
2. 必读规则见 [`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)。
3. 工程约定见 [`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)。

## 规则链路
- 入口层：`AGENTS.md`（作用域与索引）。
- 执行层：`.codex/core/AGENT.md`（流程与决策框架）。
- 约束层：`.codex/core/RULES.md`（强制规则与触发矩阵）。
- 规范层：`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`（工程实现标准）。

## 冲突裁决优先级
1. `RULES.md` 与 `CONVENTIONS.md` 冲突时，以 `RULES.md` 为准。
2. `AGENT.md` 仅定义执行流程，不得弱化 `RULES.md` 的强制约束。
3. `AGENTS.md` 作为入口索引，不新增与核心规则冲突的行为约束。
4. 未覆盖场景按 `CONVENTIONS.md` 与最小改动原则执行。

## 必要流程
- 执行前先给出方案，确认后再实施。
- 执行中小步推进，每步都验证。
- 遇到阻塞时切换策略并继续，不要静默中止。

## 结构策略（.codex 标准）
- Git 同步范围为 `./.codex/` 与本 `AGENTS.md`。
- 项目框架文件统一放在 `./.codex/`：`core/`、`skills/`、`snippets/`、`templates/`。
- 运行时技能目录位于用户级：`%USERPROFILE%\\.codex\\skills`。
- 本文件只使用相对链接，不要硬编码本地绝对路径。

## 参考
- 执行框架：[`.codex/core/AGENT.md`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md)
- 规则细则：[`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)
- 编码约定：[`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)

- 规范层：`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`（工程实现标准）。

## 冲突裁决优先级
1. `RULES.md` 与 `CONVENTIONS.md` 冲突时，以 `RULES.md` 为准。
2. `AGENT.md` 仅定义执行流程，不得弱化 `RULES.md` 的强制约束。
3. `AGENTS.md` 作为入口索引，不新增与核心规则冲突的行为约束。
4. 未覆盖场景按 `CONVENTIONS.md` 与最小改动原则执行。

## 必要流程
- 执行前先给出方案，确认后再实施。
- 执行中小步推进，每步都验证。
- 遇到阻塞时切换策略并继续，不要静默中止。

## 结构策略（.codex 标准）
- Git 同步范围为 `./.codex/` 与本 `AGENTS.md`。
- 项目框架文件统一放在 `./.codex/`：`core/`、`skills/`、`snippets/`、`templates/`。
- 运行时技能目录位于用户级：`%USERPROFILE%\\.codex\\skills`。
- 本文件只使用相对链接，不要硬编码本地绝对路径。

### How to use skills
- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.
- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.
- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.
- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):
  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.
  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.
  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.
  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.
  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.
- Coordination and sequencing:
  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.
  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.
- Context hygiene:
  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.
  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.
  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.
- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.

settings.developer_instructions:
# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

payload.user_instructions:
# AGENTS.md - Codex 项目说明

## 快速开始
1. 新成员按入场顺序阅读 [`.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start)。
2. 必读规则见 [`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)。
3. 工程约定见 [`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)。

## 规则链路
- 入口层：`AGENTS.md`（作用域与索引）。
- 执行层：`.codex/core/AGENT.md`（流程与决策框架）。
- 约束层：`.codex/core/RULES.md`（强制规则与触发矩阵）。
- 规范层：`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`（工程实现标准）。

## 冲突裁决优先级
1. `RULES.md` 与 `CONVENTIONS.md` 冲突时，以 `RULES.md` 为准。
2. `AGENT.md` 仅定义执行流程，不得弱化 `RULES.md` 的强制约束。
3. `AGENTS.md` 作为入口索引，不新增与核心规则冲突的行为约束。
4. 未覆盖场景按 `CONVENTIONS.md` 与最小改动原则执行。

## 必要流程
- 执行前先给出方案，确认后再实施。
- 执行中小步推进，每步都验证。
- 遇到阻塞时切换策略并继续，不要静默中止。

## 结构策略（.codex 标准）
- Git 同步范围为 `./.codex/` 与本 `AGENTS.md`。
- 项目框架文件统一放在 `./.codex/`：`core/`、`skills/`、`snippets/`、`templates/`。
- 运行时技能目录位于用户级：`%USERPROFILE%\\.codex\\skills`。
- 本文件只使用相对链接，不要硬编码本地绝对路径。

## 参考
- 执行框架：[`.codex/core/AGENT.md`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md)
- 规则细则：[`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)
- 编码约定：[`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)

- _template: 新建 skill 时复制此目录，填写 name/description 后开始编写指令 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/_TEMPLATE/SKILL.md)

- browser-use: 自动化浏览器交互工具，用于 Web 测试、表单填写、屏幕截图和数据提取。当用户需要导航网站、与网页交互、填写表单、捕获页面或从网页中提取信息时触发使用。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/browser-use/SKILL.md)

- docker-ci-workflow: 创建和管理 Docker GitHub Actions CI/CD 工作流。当用户需要设置 Docker 自动构建测试、镜像推送、安全扫描、多平台构建或 Docker 部署自动化时触发。支持 GitHub Registry (ghcr.io)、Docker Hub、多阶段构建缓存优化。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/docker-ci-workflow/SKILL.md)
- find-skills: 帮助用户发现和安装生态系统中的大模型 Agent 技能。当用户询问“我该如何做某事”、“寻找关于某事的技能”或希望扩展功能时触发此技能。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md)

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. payload.user_instructions:
# AGENTS.md - Codex 项目说明

## 快速开始
1. 新成员按入场顺序阅读 [`.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start)。
2. 必读规则见 [`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)。
3. 工程约定见 [`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)。

## 规则链路
- 入口层：`AGENTS.md`（作用域与索引）。
- 执行层：`.codex/core/AGENT.md`（流程与决策框架）。
- 约束层：`.codex/core/RULES.md`（强制规则与触发矩阵）。
- 规范层：`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`（工程实现标准）。

## 冲突裁决优先级
1. `RULES.md` 与 `CONVENTIONS.md` 冲突时，以 `RULES.md` 为准。
2. `AGENT.md` 仅定义执行流程，不得弱化 `RULES.md` 的强制约束。
3. `AGENTS.md` 作为入口索引，不新增与核心规则冲突的行为约束。
4. 未覆盖场景按 `CONVENTIONS.md` 与最小改动原则执行。

## 必要流程
- 执行前先给出方案，确认后再实施。
- 执行中小步推进，每步都验证。
- 遇到阻塞时切换策略并继续，不要静默中止。

## 结构策略（.codex 标准）
- Git 同步范围为 `./.codex/` 与本 `AGENTS.md`。
- 项目框架文件统一放在 `./.codex/`：`core/`、`skills/`、`snippets/`、`templates/`。
- 运行时技能目录位于用户级：`%USERPROFILE%\\.codex\\skills`。
- 本文件只使用相对链接，不要硬编码本地绝对路径。

## 参考
- 执行框架：[`.codex/core/AGENT.md`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md)
- 规则细则：[`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)
- 编码约定：[`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)

### How to use skills
- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.
- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.
- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.
- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):
  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.
  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.
  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.
  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.
  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.
- Coordination and sequencing:
  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.
  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.
- Context hygiene:
  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.
  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.
  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.
- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.

# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

# AGENTS.md - Codex 项目说明

## 快速开始
1. 新成员按入场顺序阅读 [`.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start)。
2. 必读规则见 [`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)。
3. 工程约定见 [`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)。

## 规则链路
- 入口层：`AGENTS.md`（作用域与索引）。
- 执行层：`.codex/core/AGENT.md`（流程与决策框架）。
- 约束层：`.codex/core/RULES.md`（强制规则与触发矩阵）。
- 规范层：`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`（工程实现标准）。

## 冲突裁决优先级
1. `RULES.md` 与 `CONVENTIONS.md` 冲突时，以 `RULES.md` 为准。
2. `AGENT.md` 仅定义执行流程，不得弱化 `RULES.md` 的强制约束。
3. `AGENTS.md` 作为入口索引，不新增与核心规则冲突的行为约束。
4. 未覆盖场景按 `CONVENTIONS.md` 与最小改动原则执行。

## 必要流程
- 执行前先给出方案，确认后再实施。
- 执行中小步推进，每步都验证。
- 遇到阻塞时切换策略并继续，不要静默中止。

## 结构策略（.codex 标准）
- Git 同步范围为 `./.codex/` 与本 `AGENTS.md`。
- 项目框架文件统一放在 `./.codex/`：`core/`、`skills/`、`snippets/`、`templates/`。
- 运行时技能目录位于用户级：`%USERPROFILE%\\.codex\\skills`。
- 本文件只使用相对链接，不要硬编码本地绝对路径。

## 参考
- 执行框架：[`.codex/core/AGENT.md`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md)
- 规则细则：[`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)
- 编码约定：[`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)

- browser-use: 自动化浏览器交互工具，用于 Web 测试、表单填写、屏幕截图和数据提取。当用户需要导航网站、与网页交互、填写表单、捕获页面或从网页中提取信息时触发使用。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/browser-use/SKILL.md)

# AGENTS.md - Codex 项目说明

## 快速开始
1. 新成员按入场顺序阅读 [`.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start)。
2. 必读规则见 [`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)。
3. 工程约定见 [`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)。

## 规则链路
- 入口层：`AGENTS.md`（作用域与索引）。
- 执行层：`.codex/core/AGENT.md`（流程与决策框架）。
- 约束层：`.codex/core/RULES.md`（强制规则与触发矩阵）。
- 规范层：`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`（工程实现标准）。

## 冲突裁决优先级
1. `RULES.md` 与 `CONVENTIONS.md` 冲突时，以 `RULES.md` 为准。
2. `AGENT.md` 仅定义执行流程，不得弱化 `RULES.md` 的强制约束。
3. `AGENTS.md` 作为入口索引，不新增与核心规则冲突的行为约束。
4. 未覆盖场景按 `CONVENTIONS.md` 与最小改动原则执行。

## 必要流程
- 执行前先给出方案，确认后再实施。
- 执行中小步推进，每步都验证。
- 遇到阻塞时切换策略并继续，不要静默中止。

## 结构策略（.codex 标准）
- Git 同步范围为 `./.codex/` 与本 `AGENTS.md`。
- 项目框架文件统一放在 `./.codex/`：`core/`、`skills/`、`snippets/`、`templates/`。
- 运行时技能目录位于用户级：`%USERPROFILE%\\.codex\\skills`。
- 本文件只使用相对链接，不要硬编码本地绝对路径。

## 参考
- 执行框架：[`.codex/core/AGENT.md`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md)
- 规则细则：[`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)
- 编码约定：[`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)

## Skills

- browser-use: 自动化浏览器交互工具，用于 Web 测试、表单填写、屏幕截图和数据提取。当用户需要导航网站、与网页交互、填写表单、捕获页面或从网页中提取信息时触发使用。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/browser-use/SKILL.md)
- codex-skills-sync: 同步和恢复 Codex 本地配置。用于将 `%USERPROFILE%\\.codex` 下的 `core`、`skills`、`snippets`、`templates`、`rules` 以及 `config.toml`、`AGENTS.md` 推送到 GitHub 仓库，或从 GitHub 云端恢复到本机（覆盖不删除）。当用户提出“同步到 GitHub”“云端备份”“从仓库恢复本地 Codex 配置”时使用。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/codex-skills-sync/SKILL.md)
- docker-ci-workflow: 创建和管理 Docker GitHub Actions CI/CD 工作流。当用户需要设置 Docker 自动构建测试、镜像推送、安全扫描、多平台构建或 Docker 部署自动化时触发。支持 GitHub Registry (ghcr.io)、Docker Hub、多阶段构建缓存优化。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/docker-ci-workflow/SKILL.md)
- find-skills: 帮助用户发现和安装生态系统中的大模型 Agent 技能。当用户询问“我该如何做某事”、“寻找关于某事的技能”或希望扩展功能时触发此技能。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md)
- frontend-code-review: 当用户请求审查前端文件（例如 .tsx、.ts、.js）时触发此技能。支持评审即将提交的更改（pending-change）和特定的文件检查，应用各项清单审查。审查包含代码质量、性能问题及业务逻辑。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/frontend-code-review/SKILL.md)
- frontend-design: 创建具有极高设计感和差异化美学（避免常见的“AI味”审美）的生产级前端界面。当要求构建 Web 组件、页面、海报、仪表盘、React 组件或任何 HTML/CSS 布局美化时触发。该技能将指导输出极具创意且抛光良好的 UI 设计。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/frontend-design/SKILL.md)
- fullstack-developer: 提供涵盖 React、Node.js、数据库以及全栈架构的现代 Web 开发专家级知识体系。 当执行以下任务时使用此技能：构建 Web 应用程序、开发 API、创建前端、设置数据库、部署 Web 应用，或者当用户提到 React、Next.js、Express、REST API、GraphQL、MongoDB、PostgreSQL 等全栈开发相关话题时触发。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/fullstack-developer/SKILL.md)
- requesting-code-review: 在完成任务、实现重大功能后，或在代码合并前触发，用于验证并审查代码是否满足需求标准。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/requesting-code-review/SKILL.md)
- test-driven-development: 在实现任何新功能或修复 Bug 之前，即在编写实际业务代码之前必须触发执行的 TDD 测试驱动开发规范。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/test-driven-development/SKILL.md)
- ui-ux-pro-max: 顶级 UI/UX 设计智能全书。包含几十种风格调色板和排版指导，支持 React、Vue、Tailwind 等各种主流框架。执行页面规划、构建、设计、检查、修复和优化视觉方案时触发。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md)
- vercel-react-best-practices: 来源于 Vercel 工程师团队的 React 和 Next.js 性能优化指南。当进行编写、审查或重构 React/Next.js 代码时触发，以确保最佳性能模式。适用于涉及 React 组件、Next.js 页面、数据获取、打包体积优化或性能提升的任务。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/vercel-react-best-practices/SKILL.md)
- web-design-guidelines: 根据 Vercel Web 界面指南（Web Interface Guidelines）审查 UI 代码规范性。当用户要求“审查我的 UI”、“检查无障碍访问(accessibility)”、“审计设计”、“审查 UX”或“根据最佳实践检查我的网站”时触发。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/web-design-guidelines/SKILL.md)
- webapp-testing: 使用 Playwright 与本地 Web 应用程序交互并进行测试的工具包。支持验证前端功能、调试 UI 行为、捕获浏览器屏幕截图以及查看浏览器日志。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/webapp-testing/SKILL.md)

This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)
- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)
### How to use skills
- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.
- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.
- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.
- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):
  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.
  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.
  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.
  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.
  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.
- Coordination and sequencing:
  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.
  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.
- Context hygiene:
  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.
  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.
  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.
- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.

# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

payload.user_instructions:
# AGENTS.md - Codex 项目说明

## 快速开始
1. 新成员按入场顺序阅读 [`.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start)。
2. 必读规则见 [`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)。
3. 工程约定见 [`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)。

## 规则链路
- 入口层：`AGENTS.md`（作用域与索引）。
- 执行层：`.codex/core/AGENT.md`（流程与决策框架）。
- 约束层：`.codex/core/RULES.md`（强制规则与触发矩阵）。
- 规范层：`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`（工程实现标准）。

## 冲突裁决优先级
1. `RULES.md` 与 `CONVENTIONS.md` 冲突时，以 `RULES.md` 为准。
2. `AGENT.md` 仅定义执行流程，不得弱化 `RULES.md` 的强制约束。
3. `AGENTS.md` 作为入口索引，不新增与核心规则冲突的行为约束。
4. 未覆盖场景按 `CONVENTIONS.md` 与最小改动原则执行。

## 必要流程
- 执行前先给出方案，确认后再实施。
- 执行中小步推进，每步都验证。
- 遇到阻塞时切换策略并继续，不要静默中止。

## 结构策略（.codex 标准）
- Git 同步范围为 `./.codex/` 与本 `AGENTS.md`。
- 项目框架文件统一放在 `./.codex/`：`core/`、`skills/`、`snippets/`、`templates/`。
- 运行时技能目录位于用户级：`%USERPROFILE%\\.codex\\skills`。
- 本文件只使用相对链接，不要硬编码本地绝对路径。

## 参考
- 执行框架：[`.codex/core/AGENT.md`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md)
- 规则细则：[`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)
- 编码约定：[`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)

# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

**阶段结论（仅方案，无代码改动）**

### 1. 当前项目结构分析
1. 这是一个 VitePress 站点，入口配置在 [config.ts](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/.vitepress/config.ts) 与 [theme/index.ts](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/.vitepress/theme/index.ts)。
2. 页面层主要是 `home + doc` Markdown：`index/about/blog/navigation`，其中导航页使用自定义组件 [ToolGrid.vue](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/.vitepress/theme/components/ToolGrid.vue) + [ToolCard.vue](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/.vitepress/theme/components/ToolCard.vue) + 数据 [tools.json](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/navigation/data/tools.json)。
3. 样式层存在两套主题文件：[modern.css](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/.vitepress/theme/styles/modern.css) 与 [terminal.css](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/.vitepress/theme/styles/terminal.css)，但当前仅导入 `modern.css`（[theme/index.ts](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/.vitepress/theme/index.ts):4）。
4. 构建状态正常：`npm run build` 本地通过（VitePress build success）。
5. 版本历史无法审计：当前目录不是 git 工作区（无 `.git`）。

### 2. 问题清单（不一致点）
1. 品牌体系冲突：配置是紫色 `#8b5cf6`（[config.ts](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/.vitepress/config.ts):11），`modern.css`是蓝青体系（[modern.css](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/.vitepress/theme/styles/modern.css):18），`terminal.css`是棕金体系（[terminal.css](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/.vitepress/theme/styles/terminal.css):9），首页文案也写“紫罗兰”（[index.md](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/index.md):7,31）。
2. 样式依赖断裂：`gradient-divider` 与 `nav-category-title` 仅在 `terminal.css` 定义（[terminal.css](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/.vitepress/theme/styles/terminal.css):340,359），但 `terminal.css` 未导入；页面和组件仍在使用这些类（[about.md](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/about.md):12, [blog/index.md](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/blog/index.md):12, [navigation/index.md](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/navigation/index.md):16, [ToolGrid.vue](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/.vitepress/theme/components/ToolGrid.vue):3）。
3. 组件语义不一致：分类标题 icon 直接输出字符串（`blog/link/...`）而非图标组件（[ToolGrid.vue](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/.vitepress/theme/components/ToolGrid.vue):4），但卡片内使用 `SvgIcons`（[ToolCard.vue](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/.vitepress/theme/components/ToolCard.vue):13）。
4. 页面结构不统一：`blog` 和 `navigation` 里写了内联 `<style>`（[blog/index.md](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/blog/index.md):19, [navigation/index.md](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/navigation/index.md):26），`about` 没有同等样式模块，导致页面间样式来源分散。
5. 交互逻辑有泄漏风险：`theme/index.ts` 在 `onMounted` 给元素绑定 `mousemove`（[theme/index.ts](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/.vitepress/theme/index.ts):50-52），`onUnmounted` 只断开 observer（:75-79），没有移除这些监听。
6. 交互架构重复：`theme/index.ts` 已实现滚动/光晕逻辑，同时 `composables` 又有完整实现但未被引用（全局检索无引用）；且 `useMousePosition`/`useElementMousePosition` 返回的是快照值（[useMousePosition.ts](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/.vitepress/theme/composables/useMousePosition.ts):118-125,312-324），后续接入易踩坑。
7. 文档与实现漂移：组件 README 声明了 Button/Input/Modal/Form 体系（[README.md](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/.vitepress/theme/components/README.md):7-23），但实际目录只有 Tool 系列组件，`base` 目录为空。
8. 内容规范不一致：仍有占位社交信息（[config.ts](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/.vitepress/config.ts):45, [about.md](D:/PROJECT_ZZZZZZZZZ/blog-nevigation/docs/about.md):33-34）。

### 3. 统一规范设计（先定标准）
**可选方案（2-3 个）**
1. 方案A（推荐）：保留 `modern.css` 的蓝色玻璃拟态作为唯一主题，清理/下线 `terminal.css`，统一页面与组件到同一 token 体系。
2. 方案B：切回 terminal 主题并重写当前组件风格，保留命令行视觉语言。
3. 方案C：做双主题（modern/terminal）可切换，增加主题抽象层与运行时切换逻辑。

**推荐理由**
1. 当前生效样式和大部分组件已偏向 modern，迁移成本最低。
2. 能最快解决“样式断裂 + 组件不一致 + 可维护性”问题。
3. 避免双主题带来的设计与测试复杂度。

**统一规范（目标标准）**
1. 视觉规范：建立唯一 Design Token（颜色/文字/间距/圆角/阴影/动效/断点），只保留一套品牌色；`theme-color`、首页文案、CSS token 全同步。
2. 布局规范：所有 doc 页统一 `PageIntro + Divider + ContentSection` 模板，不允许在 Markdown 内写内联 `<style>`。
3. 组件规范：分类标题与卡片图标统一走 `SvgIcons`；工具卡片、标签、分区标题、分割线形成原子化组件。
4. 交互规范：滚动动画与鼠标光晕统一由 composable 驱动；监听器必须成对注册/卸载；`prefers-reduced-motion` 全覆盖。
5. 数据规范：导航数据 schema 固化（`icon/title/description/url/tags`），约束 icon key 与组件映射一致。
6. 工程规范：删除死代码与失效样式；组件 README 与真实目录结构同步；占位内容替换为可配置字段。

### 4. 重构实施计划（确认后执行）
1. 第1阶段：收敛主题入口与 token，确定唯一品牌体系并修复 `theme-color`、文案与变量冲突。
2. 第2阶段：修复样式断裂（`gradient-divider/nav-category-title`）并清理无效主题文件。
3. 第3阶段：统一页面模板，移除 Markdown 内联样式，抽出共享页面块组件。
4. 第4阶段：统一组件规范（ToolGrid/ToolCard/Icon 渲染规则、数据契约）。
5. 第5阶段：收敛交互逻辑到 composable，补齐监听器清理，移除重复实现。
6. 第6阶段：更新文档与配置占位项，执行构建验证与页面回归检查。

你确认后我再开始第1阶段重构。  
只需要回复一句：**“按方案A执行”**，或指定你要的方案（B/C）。

3. 组件规范：分类标题与卡片图标统一走 `SvgIcons`；工具卡片、标签、分区标题、分割线形成原子化组件。
4. 交互规范：滚动动画与鼠标光晕统一由 composable 驱动；监听器必须成对注册/卸载；`prefers-reduced-motion` 全覆盖。
5. 数据规范：导航数据 schema 固化（`icon/title/description/url/tags`），约束 icon key 与组件映射一致。
6. 工程规范：删除死代码与失效样式；组件 README 与真实目录结构同步；占位内容替换为可配置字段。

### 4. 重构实施计划（确认后执行）
1. 第1阶段：收敛主题入口与 token，确定唯一品牌体系并修复 `theme-color`、文案与变量冲突。
2. 第2阶段：修复样式断裂（`gradient-divider/nav-category-title`）并清理无效主题文件。
3. 第3阶段：统一页面模板，移除 Markdown 内联样式，抽出共享页面块组件。
4. 第4阶段：统一组件规范（ToolGrid/ToolCard/Icon 渲染规则、数据契约）。
5. 第5阶段：收敛交互逻辑到 composable，补齐监听器清理，移除重复实现。
6. 第6阶段：更新文档与配置占位项，执行构建验证与页面回归检查。

你确认后我再开始第1阶段重构。  
只需要回复一句：**“按方案A执行”**，或指定你要的方案（B/C）。

content.text: 按方案A执行

- _template: 新建 skill 时复制此目录，填写 name/description 后开始编写指令 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/_TEMPLATE/SKILL.md)
- brainstorming: 在进行任何创造性工作（如创建功能、构建组件、添加功能或修改行为）之前，您必须强制使用此技能。用于在编写代码前探索用户意图、梳理需求和设计方案。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/brainstorming/SKILL.md)
- browser-use: 自动化浏览器交互工具，用于 Web 测试、表单填写、屏幕截图和数据提取。当用户需要导航网站、与网页交互、填写表单、捕获页面或从网页中提取信息时触发使用。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/browser-use/SKILL.md)
- codex-skills-sync: 同步和恢复 Codex 本地配置。用于将 `%USERPROFILE%\\.codex` 下的 `core`、`skills`、`snippets`、`templates`、`rules` 以及 `config.toml`、`AGENTS.md` 推送到 GitHub 仓库，或从 GitHub 云端恢复到本机（覆盖不删除）。当用户提出“同步到 GitHub”“云端备份”“从仓库恢复本地 Codex 配置”时使用。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/codex-skills-sync/SKILL.md)

- find-skills: 帮助用户发现和安装生态系统中的大模型 Agent 技能。当用户询问“我该如何做某事”、“寻找关于某事的技能”或希望扩展功能时触发此技能。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md)

- webapp-testing: 使用 Playwright 与本地 Web 应用程序交互并进行测试的工具包。支持验证前端功能、调试 UI 行为、捕获浏览器屏幕截图以及查看浏览器日志。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/webapp-testing/SKILL.md)
- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)
- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)
### How to use skills
- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.
- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.
- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.
- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):
  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.
  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.
  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.
  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.
  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.
- Coordination and sequencing:
  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.
  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.
- Context hygiene:
  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.
  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.
  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.
- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.

- frontend-design: 创建具有极高设计感和差异化美学（避免常见的“AI味”审美）的生产级前端界面。当要求构建 Web 组件、页面、海报、仪表盘、React 组件或任何 HTML/CSS 布局美化时触发。该技能将指导输出极具创意且抛光良好的 UI 设计。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/frontend-design/SKILL.md)

### How to use skills
- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.
- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.
- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.
- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):
  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.
  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.
  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.
  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.
  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.
- Coordination and sequencing:
  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.
  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.
- Context hygiene:
  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.
  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.
  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.
- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.

# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

# AGENTS.md - Codex 项目说明

## 快速开始
1. 新成员按入场顺序阅读 [`.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start)。
2. 必读规则见 [`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)。
3. 工程约定见 [`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)。

## 规则链路
- 入口层：`AGENTS.md`（作用域与索引）。
- 执行层：`.codex/core/AGENT.md`（流程与决策框架）。
- 约束层：`.codex/core/RULES.md`（强制规则与触发矩阵）。
- 规范层：`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`（工程实现标准）。

## 冲突裁决优先级
1. `RULES.md` 与 `CONVENTIONS.md` 冲突时，以 `RULES.md` 为准。
2. `AGENT.md` 仅定义执行流程，不得弱化 `RULES.md` 的强制约束。
3. `AGENTS.md` 作为入口索引，不新增与核心规则冲突的行为约束。
4. 未覆盖场景按 `CONVENTIONS.md` 与最小改动原则执行。

## 必要流程
- 执行前先给出方案，确认后再实施。
- 执行中小步推进，每步都验证。
- 遇到阻塞时切换策略并继续，不要静默中止。

## 结构策略（.codex 标准）
- Git 同步范围为 `./.codex/` 与本 `AGENTS.md`。
- 项目框架文件统一放在 `./.codex/`：`core/`、`skills/`、`snippets/`、`templates/`。
- 运行时技能目录位于用户级：`%USERPROFILE%\\.codex\\skills`。
- 本文件只使用相对链接，不要硬编码本地绝对路径。

## 参考
- 执行框架：[`.codex/core/AGENT.md`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md)
- 规则细则：[`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)
- 编码约定：[`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)

## 快速开始
1. 新成员按入场顺序阅读 [`.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start)。
2. 必读规则见 [`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)。
3. 工程约定见 [`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)。

## 规则链路
- 入口层：`AGENTS.md`（作用域与索引）。
- 执行层：`.codex/core/AGENT.md`（流程与决策框架）。
- 约束层：`.codex/core/RULES.md`（强制规则与触发矩阵）。
- 规范层：`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`（工程实现标准）。

## 冲突裁决优先级
1. `RULES.md` 与 `CONVENTIONS.md` 冲突时，以 `RULES.md` 为准。
2. `AGENT.md` 仅定义执行流程，不得弱化 `RULES.md` 的强制约束。
3. `AGENTS.md` 作为入口索引，不新增与核心规则冲突的行为约束。
4. 未覆盖场景按 `CONVENTIONS.md` 与最小改动原则执行。

## 必要流程
- 执行前先给出方案，确认后再实施。
- 执行中小步推进，每步都验证。
- 遇到阻塞时切换策略并继续，不要静默中止。

## 结构策略（.codex 标准）
- Git 同步范围为 `./.codex/` 与本 `AGENTS.md`。
- 项目框架文件统一放在 `./.codex/`：`core/`、`skills/`、`snippets/`、`templates/`。
- 运行时技能目录位于用户级：`%USERPROFILE%\\.codex\\skills`。
- 本文件只使用相对链接，不要硬编码本地绝对路径。

## 参考
- 执行框架：[`.codex/core/AGENT.md`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md)
- 规则细则：[`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)
- 编码约定：[`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)


## Skills
A skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.
### Available skills
- _template: 新建 skill 时复制此目录，填写 name/description 后开始编写指令 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/_TEMPLATE/SKILL.md)
- brainstorming: 在进行任何创造性工作（如创建功能、构建组件、添加功能或修改行为）之前，您必须强制使用此技能。用于在编写代码前探索用户意图、梳理需求和设计方案。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/brainstorming/SKILL.md)
- browser-use: 自动化浏览器交互工具，用于 Web 测试、表单填写、屏幕截图和数据提取。当用户需要导航网站、与网页交互、填写表单、捕获页面或从网页中提取信息时触发使用。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/browser-use/SKILL.md)
- codex-skills-sync: 同步和恢复 Codex 本地配置。用于将 `%USERPROFILE%\\.codex` 下的 `core`、`skills`、`snippets`、`templates`、`rules` 以及 `config.toml`、`AGENTS.md` 推送到 GitHub 仓库，或从 GitHub 云端恢复到本机（覆盖不删除）。当用户提出“同步到 GitHub”“云端备份”“从仓库恢复本地 Codex 配置”时使用。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/codex-skills-sync/SKILL.md)
- docker-ci-workflow: 创建和管理 Docker GitHub Actions CI/CD 工作流。当用户需要设置 Docker 自动构建测试、镜像推送、安全扫描、多平台构建或 Docker 部署自动化时触发。支持 GitHub Registry (ghcr.io)、Docker Hub、多阶段构建缓存优化。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/docker-ci-workflow/SKILL.md)
- find-skills: 帮助用户发现和安装生态系统中的大模型 Agent 技能。当用户询问“我该如何做某事”、“寻找关于某事的技能”或希望扩展功能时触发此技能。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md)
- frontend-code-review: 当用户请求审查前端文件（例如 .tsx、.ts、.js）时触发此技能。支持评审即将提交的更改（pending-change）和特定的文件检查，应用各项清单审查。审查包含代码质量、性能问题及业务逻辑。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/frontend-code-review/SKILL.md)
- frontend-design: 创建具有极高设计感和差异化美学（避免常见的“AI味”审美）的生产级前端界面。当要求构建 Web 组件、页面、海报、仪表盘、React 组件或任何 HTML/CSS 布局美化时触发。该技能将指导输出极具创意且抛光良好的 UI 设计。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/frontend-design/SKILL.md)
- fullstack-developer: 提供涵盖 React、Node.js、数据库以及全栈架构的现代 Web 开发专家级知识体系。 当执行以下任务时使用此技能：构建 Web 应用程序、开发 API、创建前端、设置数据库、部署 Web 应用，或者当用户提到 React、Next.js、Express、REST API、GraphQL、MongoDB、PostgreSQL 等全栈开发相关话题时触发。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/fullstack-developer/SKILL.md)
- requesting-code-review: 在完成任务、实现重大功能后，或在代码合并前触发，用于验证并审查代码是否满足需求标准。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/requesting-code-review/SKILL.md)
- test-driven-development: 在实现任何新功能或修复 Bug 之前，即在编写实际业务代码之前必须触发执行的 TDD 测试驱动开发规范。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/test-driven-development/SKILL.md)
- ui-ux-pro-max: 顶级 UI/UX 设计智能全书。包含几十种风格调色板和排版指导，支持 React、Vue、Tailwind 等各种主流框架。执行页面规划、构建、设计、检查、修复和优化视觉方案时触发。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md)
- vercel-react-best-practices: 来源于 Vercel 工程师团队的 React 和 Next.js 性能优化指南。当进行编写、审查或重构 React/Next.js 代码时触发，以确保最佳性能模式。适用于涉及 React 组件、Next.js 页面、数据获取、打包体积优化或性能提升的任务。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/vercel-react-best-practices/SKILL.md)
- web-design-guidelines: 根据 Vercel Web 界面指南（Web Interface Guidelines）审查 UI 代码规范性。当用户要求“审查我的 UI”、“检查无障碍访问(accessibility)”、“审计设计”、“审查 UX”或“根据最佳实践检查我的网站”时触发。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/web-design-guidelines/SKILL.md)
- webapp-testing: 使用 Playwright 与本地 Web 应用程序交互并进行测试的工具包。支持验证前端功能、调试 UI 行为、捕获浏览器屏幕截图以及查看浏览器日志。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/webapp-testing/SKILL.md)
- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)
- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)
### How to use skills
- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.
- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.
- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.
- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):
  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.
  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.
  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.
  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.
  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.
- Coordination and sequencing:
  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.
  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.
- Context hygiene:
  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.
  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.
  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.
- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.

# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

### How to use skills
- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.
- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.
- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.
- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):
  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.
  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.
  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.
  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.
  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.
- Coordination and sequencing:
  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.
  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.
- Context hygiene:
  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.
  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.
  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.
- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.

settings.developer_instructions:
# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

payload.user_instructions:
# AGENTS.md - Codex 项目说明

## 快速开始
1. 新成员按入场顺序阅读 [`.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start)。
2. 必读规则见 [`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)。
3. 工程约定见 [`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)。

## 规则链路
- 入口层：`AGENTS.md`（作用域与索引）。
- 执行层：`.codex/core/AGENT.md`（流程与决策框架）。
- 约束层：`.codex/core/RULES.md`（强制规则与触发矩阵）。
- 规范层：`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`（工程实现标准）。

## 冲突裁决优先级
1. `RULES.md` 与 `CONVENTIONS.md` 冲突时，以 `RULES.md` 为准。
2. `AGENT.md` 仅定义执行流程，不得弱化 `RULES.md` 的强制约束。
3. `AGENTS.md` 作为入口索引，不新增与核心规则冲突的行为约束。
4. 未覆盖场景按 `CONVENTIONS.md` 与最小改动原则执行。

## 必要流程
- 执行前先给出方案，确认后再实施。
- 执行中小步推进，每步都验证。
- 遇到阻塞时切换策略并继续，不要静默中止。

## 结构策略（.codex 标准）
- Git 同步范围为 `./.codex/` 与本 `AGENTS.md`。
- 项目框架文件统一放在 `./.codex/`：`core/`、`skills/`、`snippets/`、`templates/`。
- 运行时技能目录位于用户级：`%USERPROFILE%\\.codex\\skills`。
- 本文件只使用相对链接，不要硬编码本地绝对路径。

## 参考
- 执行框架：[`.codex/core/AGENT.md`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md)
- 规则细则：[`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)
- 编码约定：[`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)

# AGENTS.md - Codex 项目说明

## 快速开始
1. 新成员按入场顺序阅读 [`.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start)。
2. 必读规则见 [`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)。
3. 工程约定见 [`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)。

## 规则链路
- 入口层：`AGENTS.md`（作用域与索引）。
- 执行层：`.codex/core/AGENT.md`（流程与决策框架）。
- 约束层：`.codex/core/RULES.md`（强制规则与触发矩阵）。
- 规范层：`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`（工程实现标准）。

## 冲突裁决优先级
1. `RULES.md` 与 `CONVENTIONS.md` 冲突时，以 `RULES.md` 为准。
2. `AGENT.md` 仅定义执行流程，不得弱化 `RULES.md` 的强制约束。
3. `AGENTS.md` 作为入口索引，不新增与核心规则冲突的行为约束。
4. 未覆盖场景按 `CONVENTIONS.md` 与最小改动原则执行。

## 必要流程
- 执行前先给出方案，确认后再实施。
- 执行中小步推进，每步都验证。
- 遇到阻塞时切换策略并继续，不要静默中止。

## 结构策略（.codex 标准）
- Git 同步范围为 `./.codex/` 与本 `AGENTS.md`。
- 项目框架文件统一放在 `./.codex/`：`core/`、`skills/`、`snippets/`、`templates/`。
- 运行时技能目录位于用户级：`%USERPROFILE%\\.codex\\skills`。
- 本文件只使用相对链接，不要硬编码本地绝对路径。

## 参考
- 执行框架：[`.codex/core/AGENT.md`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md)
- 规则细则：[`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)
- 编码约定：[`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

# AGENTS.md - Codex 项目说明

## 快速开始
1. 新成员按入场顺序阅读 [`.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start)。
2. 必读规则见 [`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)。
3. 工程约定见 [`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)。

## 规则链路
- 入口层：`AGENTS.md`（作用域与索引）。
- 执行层：`.codex/core/AGENT.md`（流程与决策框架）。
- 约束层：`.codex/core/RULES.md`（强制规则与触发矩阵）。
- 规范层：`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`（工程实现标准）。

## 冲突裁决优先级
1. `RULES.md` 与 `CONVENTIONS.md` 冲突时，以 `RULES.md` 为准。
2. `AGENT.md` 仅定义执行流程，不得弱化 `RULES.md` 的强制约束。
3. `AGENTS.md` 作为入口索引，不新增与核心规则冲突的行为约束。
4. 未覆盖场景按 `CONVENTIONS.md` 与最小改动原则执行。

## 必要流程
- 执行前先给出方案，确认后再实施。
- 执行中小步推进，每步都验证。
- 遇到阻塞时切换策略并继续，不要静默中止。

## 结构策略（.codex 标准）
- Git 同步范围为 `./.codex/` 与本 `AGENTS.md`。
- 项目框架文件统一放在 `./.codex/`：`core/`、`skills/`、`snippets/`、`templates/`。
- 运行时技能目录位于用户级：`%USERPROFILE%\\.codex\\skills`。
- 本文件只使用相对链接，不要硬编码本地绝对路径。

## 参考
- 执行框架：[`.codex/core/AGENT.md`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md)
- 规则细则：[`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)
- 编码约定：[`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)

# AGENTS.md - Codex 项目说明

## 快速开始
1. 新成员按入场顺序阅读 [`.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start)。
2. 必读规则见 [`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)。
3. 工程约定见 [`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)。

## 规则链路
- 入口层：`AGENTS.md`（作用域与索引）。
- 执行层：`.codex/core/AGENT.md`（流程与决策框架）。
- 约束层：`.codex/core/RULES.md`（强制规则与触发矩阵）。
- 规范层：`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`（工程实现标准）。

## 冲突裁决优先级
1. `RULES.md` 与 `CONVENTIONS.md` 冲突时，以 `RULES.md` 为准。
2. `AGENT.md` 仅定义执行流程，不得弱化 `RULES.md` 的强制约束。
3. `AGENTS.md` 作为入口索引，不新增与核心规则冲突的行为约束。
4. 未覆盖场景按 `CONVENTIONS.md` 与最小改动原则执行。

## 必要流程
- 执行前先给出方案，确认后再实施。
- 执行中小步推进，每步都验证。
- 遇到阻塞时切换策略并继续，不要静默中止。

## 结构策略（.codex 标准）
- Git 同步范围为 `./.codex/` 与本 `AGENTS.md`。
- 项目框架文件统一放在 `./.codex/`：`core/`、`skills/`、`snippets/`、`templates/`。
- 运行时技能目录位于用户级：`%USERPROFILE%\\.codex\\skills`。
- 本文件只使用相对链接，不要硬编码本地绝对路径。

## 参考
- 执行框架：[`.codex/core/AGENT.md`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md)
- 规则细则：[`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)
- 编码约定：[`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)


## Skills
A skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.
### Available skills
- _template: 新建 skill 时复制此目录，填写 name/description 后开始编写指令 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/_TEMPLATE/SKILL.md)
- brainstorming: 在进行任何创造性工作（如创建功能、构建组件、添加功能或修改行为）之前，您必须强制使用此技能。用于在编写代码前探索用户意图、梳理需求和设计方案。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/brainstorming/SKILL.md)
- browser-use: 自动化浏览器交互工具，用于 Web 测试、表单填写、屏幕截图和数据提取。当用户需要导航网站、与网页交互、填写表单、捕获页面或从网页中提取信息时触发使用。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/browser-use/SKILL.md)
- codex-skills-sync: 同步和恢复 Codex 本地配置。用于将 `%USERPROFILE%\\.codex` 下的 `core`、`skills`、`snippets`、`templates`、`rules` 以及 `config.toml`、`AGENTS.md` 推送到 GitHub 仓库，或从 GitHub 云端恢复到本机（覆盖不删除）。当用户提出“同步到 GitHub”“云端备份”“从仓库恢复本地 Codex 配置”时使用。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/codex-skills-sync/SKILL.md)
- docker-ci-workflow: 创建和管理 Docker GitHub Actions CI/CD 工作流。当用户需要设置 Docker 自动构建测试、镜像推送、安全扫描、多平台构建或 Docker 部署自动化时触发。支持 GitHub Registry (ghcr.io)、Docker Hub、多阶段构建缓存优化。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/docker-ci-workflow/SKILL.md)
- find-skills: 帮助用户发现和安装生态系统中的大模型 Agent 技能。当用户询问“我该如何做某事”、“寻找关于某事的技能”或希望扩展功能时触发此技能。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md)
- frontend-code-review: 当用户请求审查前端文件（例如 .tsx、.ts、.js）时触发此技能。支持评审即将提交的更改（pending-change）和特定的文件检查，应用各项清单审查。审查包含代码质量、性能问题及业务逻辑。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/frontend-code-review/SKILL.md)
- frontend-design: 创建具有极高设计感和差异化美学（避免常见的“AI味”审美）的生产级前端界面。当要求构建 Web 组件、页面、海报、仪表盘、React 组件或任何 HTML/CSS 布局美化时触发。该技能将指导输出极具创意且抛光良好的 UI 设计。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/frontend-design/SKILL.md)
- fullstack-developer: 提供涵盖 React、Node.js、数据库以及全栈架构的现代 Web 开发专家级知识体系。 当执行以下任务时使用此技能：构建 Web 应用程序、开发 API、创建前端、设置数据库、部署 Web 应用，或者当用户提到 React、Next.js、Express、REST API、GraphQL、MongoDB、PostgreSQL 等全栈开发相关话题时触发。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/fullstack-developer/SKILL.md)
- requesting-code-review: 在完成任务、实现重大功能后，或在代码合并前触发，用于验证并审查代码是否满足需求标准。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/requesting-code-review/SKILL.md)
- test-driven-development: 在实现任何新功能或修复 Bug 之前，即在编写实际业务代码之前必须触发执行的 TDD 测试驱动开发规范。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/test-driven-development/SKILL.md)
- ui-ux-pro-max: 顶级 UI/UX 设计智能全书。包含几十种风格调色板和排版指导，支持 React、Vue、Tailwind 等各种主流框架。执行页面规划、构建、设计、检查、修复和优化视觉方案时触发。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md)
- vercel-react-best-practices: 来源于 Vercel 工程师团队的 React 和 Next.js 性能优化指南。当进行编写、审查或重构 React/Next.js 代码时触发，以确保最佳性能模式。适用于涉及 React 组件、Next.js 页面、数据获取、打包体积优化或性能提升的任务。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/vercel-react-best-practices/SKILL.md)
- web-design-guidelines: 根据 Vercel Web 界面指南（Web Interface Guidelines）审查 UI 代码规范性。当用户要求“审查我的 UI”、“检查无障碍访问(accessibility)”、“审计设计”、“审查 UX”或“根据最佳实践检查我的网站”时触发。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/web-design-guidelines/SKILL.md)
- webapp-testing: 使用 Playwright 与本地 Web 应用程序交互并进行测试的工具包。支持验证前端功能、调试 UI 行为、捕获浏览器屏幕截图以及查看浏览器日志。 (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/webapp-testing/SKILL.md)
- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)
- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: C:/Users/24228/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)
### How to use skills
- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.
- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.
- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.
- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):
  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.
  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.
  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.
  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.
  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.
- Coordination and sequencing:
  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.
  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.
- Context hygiene:
  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.
  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.
  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.
- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.

settings.developer_instructions:
# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

payload.user_instructions:
# AGENTS.md - Codex 项目说明

## 快速开始
1. 新成员按入场顺序阅读 [`.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start)。
2. 必读规则见 [`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)。
3. 工程约定见 [`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)。

## 规则链路
- 入口层：`AGENTS.md`（作用域与索引）。
- 执行层：`.codex/core/AGENT.md`（流程与决策框架）。
- 约束层：`.codex/core/RULES.md`（强制规则与触发矩阵）。
- 规范层：`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`（工程实现标准）。

## 冲突裁决优先级
1. `RULES.md` 与 `CONVENTIONS.md` 冲突时，以 `RULES.md` 为准。
2. `AGENT.md` 仅定义执行流程，不得弱化 `RULES.md` 的强制约束。
3. `AGENTS.md` 作为入口索引，不新增与核心规则冲突的行为约束。
4. 未覆盖场景按 `CONVENTIONS.md` 与最小改动原则执行。

## 必要流程
- 执行前先给出方案，确认后再实施。
- 执行中小步推进，每步都验证。
- 遇到阻塞时切换策略并继续，不要静默中止。

## 结构策略（.codex 标准）
- Git 同步范围为 `./.codex/` 与本 `AGENTS.md`。
- 项目框架文件统一放在 `./.codex/`：`core/`、`skills/`、`snippets/`、`templates/`。
- 运行时技能目录位于用户级：`%USERPROFILE%\\.codex\\skills`。
- 本文件只使用相对链接，不要硬编码本地绝对路径。

## 参考
- 执行框架：[`.codex/core/AGENT.md`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md)
- 规则细则：[`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)
- 编码约定：[`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)

# AGENTS.md - Codex 项目说明

## 快速开始
1. 新成员按入场顺序阅读 [`.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start)。
2. 必读规则见 [`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)。
3. 工程约定见 [`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)。

## 规则链路
- 入口层：`AGENTS.md`（作用域与索引）。
- 执行层：`.codex/core/AGENT.md`（流程与决策框架）。
- 约束层：`.codex/core/RULES.md`（强制规则与触发矩阵）。
- 规范层：`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`（工程实现标准）。

## 冲突裁决优先级
1. `RULES.md` 与 `CONVENTIONS.md` 冲突时，以 `RULES.md` 为准。
2. `AGENT.md` 仅定义执行流程，不得弱化 `RULES.md` 的强制约束。
3. `AGENTS.md` 作为入口索引，不新增与核心规则冲突的行为约束。
4. 未覆盖场景按 `CONVENTIONS.md` 与最小改动原则执行。

## 必要流程
- 执行前先给出方案，确认后再实施。
- 执行中小步推进，每步都验证。
- 遇到阻塞时切换策略并继续，不要静默中止。

## 结构策略（.codex 标准）
- Git 同步范围为 `./.codex/` 与本 `AGENTS.md`。
- 项目框架文件统一放在 `./.codex/`：`core/`、`skills/`、`snippets/`、`templates/`。
- 运行时技能目录位于用户级：`%USERPROFILE%\\.codex\\skills`。
- 本文件只使用相对链接，不要硬编码本地绝对路径。

- 编码约定：[`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)

1. 新成员按入场顺序阅读 [`.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md#quick-start)。
2. 必读规则见 [`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)。
3. 工程约定见 [`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)。

## 规则链路
- 入口层：`AGENTS.md`（作用域与索引）。
- 执行层：`.codex/core/AGENT.md`（流程与决策框架）。
- 约束层：`.codex/core/RULES.md`（强制规则与触发矩阵）。
- 规范层：`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`（工程实现标准）。

## 冲突裁决优先级
1. `RULES.md` 与 `CONVENTIONS.md` 冲突时，以 `RULES.md` 为准。
2. `AGENT.md` 仅定义执行流程，不得弱化 `RULES.md` 的强制约束。
3. `AGENTS.md` 作为入口索引，不新增与核心规则冲突的行为约束。
4. 未覆盖场景按 `CONVENTIONS.md` 与最小改动原则执行。

## 必要流程
- 执行前先给出方案，确认后再实施。
- 执行中小步推进，每步都验证。
- 遇到阻塞时切换策略并继续，不要静默中止。

## 结构策略（.codex 标准）
- Git 同步范围为 `./.codex/` 与本 `AGENTS.md`。
- 项目框架文件统一放在 `./.codex/`：`core/`、`skills/`、`snippets/`、`templates/`。
- 运行时技能目录位于用户级：`%USERPROFILE%\\.codex\\skills`。
- 本文件只使用相对链接，不要硬编码本地绝对路径。

## 参考
- 执行框架：[`.codex/core/AGENT.md`](./.codex/core/AGENT.md)
- 规则细则：[`.codex/core/RULES.md`](./.codex/core/RULES.md)
- 编码约定：[`.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md`](./.codex/core/CONVENTIONS.md)
